• ~ deals 4 damage to any target.
• Destroy target artifact.
• Create two 1/1 red Goblin creature tokens with haste.
• Until end of turn, whenever you cast an instant or sorcery spell, ~ deals 1 damage to any target.", "flavor_text": ""Every flame holds infinite potential, waiting for the right spark to set it free."", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare"}, {"name": "The Great Migration", "mana_cost": "{2}{G}", "cmc": 3, "colors": ["G"], "color_identity": ["G"], "type_line": "Enchantment — Saga", "oracle_text": "I — Search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle.
II — Create a 3/3 green Beast creature token.
III — You may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. If you do, it gains haste until end of turn.", "flavor_text": null, "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "rare"}, {"name": "Crystal Caverns", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Land", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {C}.
{3}, {T}: Scry 2, then draw a card.", "flavor_text": "Deep beneath the earth, crystalline formations whisper secrets of ages past.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "uncommon"}, {"name": "Forest", "mana_cost": "", "cmc": 0, "colors": [], "color_identity": [], "type_line": "Basic Land — Forest", "oracle_text": "{T}: Add {G}.", "flavor_text": "Ancient roots intertwine beneath the canopy, sharing nutrients and whispered wisdom across generations of growth.", "power": null, "toughness": null, "loyalty": null, "rarity": "common"}]}
